LanguageData.HD_PhotochlorogenCan_Deploy_Desc: Ignite the can. It will burn for a while, repeatedly spreading photochlorogen gas in a radius of {0} cells.
LanguageData.HD_PhotochlorogenCan_Deploy_Used: This can has already been released.
LanguageData.HD_PhotochlorogenCan_Deploy_Message: {0} ignited {1}, which began spreading photochlorogen gas in a radius of {2} cells.
